prestazioni: VQ37VHR (3.7L V6) engine with a HKS GT-SS turbo kit featuring a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger, HKS 264°/264° camshafts, and a Tomei 44mm wastegate for 550whp on E85 fuel with a supporting AEM Infinity 7 ECU tune and ID1000x injectors

Stillen Gen 3 supercharger system with a Vortech V-3 Si-Trim centrifugal blower, custom Stillen intercooler, and a Z1 Motorsports 3.5" intake plenum for 450whp on 93 octane with a Nismo 370Z-specific ECU reflash

Full Z1 Motorsports bolt-on package including 74mm throttle body, Z1 Motorsports 1-7/8" equal-length headers, Tomei 70mm titanium exhaust, and a Cusco Type RS 2-way LSD with 1.5/2.0 way preload settings for track use
estetica: Veilside Fortune 370Z widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood and trunk for weight reduction and aggressive stance

Work Meister S1 3P 19x9.5 +22 front and 19x11 +30 rear wheels with Toyo R888R 275/35/19 and 315/30/19 tires, mounted on BC Racing BR coilovers with Swift springs and custom camber plates for -3.5° front and -2.8° rear alignment

Custom Rocket Bunny GT wing with 3D-printed carbon fiber endplates, a custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts for the Tomei titanium exhaust, all painted in Nissan Racing Yellow (403) with matte black accents
